title: D&Z Plastic Tablecloth Disposable, 12 Pack Orange Table Cloth Individually Wrapped for Indoor&Outdoor, 84” Round Table Cover for Party, Birthday, Wedding and Dinner
features: Basic Table Setting : Designed in a solid hue, these disposable table cover greet your guests in style by setting your table without spending huge money. This plastic tablecloths offer you a simple but practical base to set the dinning table for various events or get-together while ensuring your table stays protected from spills or stains. You can easily decorate your table with colorful dinnerware, tableware and napkins to create a playful display.

Individually Wrapped for On-the-Go: Each party plastic tablecloth is individually wrapped. No need to split them up. Away from a mess of twisted tablecloths! On-the-go tablecloths are designed for indoor or outdoor use and add style to any dining setting. Perfect for any special occasions like Picnic, Parties, Banquets, Birthday Parties, Wedding, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas & More.

Convenient Event Experience: These disposable tablecloths for round table effectively protect your table from those spills from food, drinks, and paint from crafts. Simply toss them out and wipe down! You can even use it next time! Crafted from premium PEVA material, this 12 PACK plastic tablecloth are able to stand up to any spill or mess. The plastic disposable tablecloths makes post-party cleanup a breeze. Enjoy your time without worrying about the mess!

Value Pack : This 12 PACK disposable plastic tablecloths are the best choice for decorating your table without spending huge money. Enhance your dining experience with this set of 12 table throw! Our disposable table cloths are suitable for various occasions such as parties, weddings, birthdays, BBQs, corporate events, and holiday celebrations. Our bulk packs come in various quantities and colors, you can choose according to your own preferences and match your color scheme.

Full Coverage&Pre-cut For Your Convenience: Measuring 84" x 84", our holiday tablecloths provide better coverage for 4, 5 and 6 foot tables . Allow for 40-50cm (16"-20") overhang but this can be down to personal preference. Thanks to its solid hue, our table cover with a simplistic appearance blend in seamlessly with your home decor and are perfect for creating a festive atmosphere. Pre-cut, no worries about cutting the table cover roll.
description: Product description Are you worried that the plastic tablecloth is not thick enough? Are you still tired of the heavy and dirty cleaning work of your tables after holding a party? Get your party start in a flash with D&Z plastic disposable tablecovers! The colorful tablecloths can be used for desktop protection or as decorative background to make your party impressive. SPECIFICATION Size: 84" round table cover Quantity: pack of 12 Material: plastic (PEVA) Available colors: white, black, red, gold, navy blue, dark blue, pink, silver, orange, purple ADVANTAGES OF PEVA MATERIALS - PEVA is a new kind of environment-friendly material. - Odorless, BPA free and 100% food and kid safe. - Soft texture, hang down feeling and elasticity. - Good tear resistance and bearing capacity. - Waterproof and oil-proof to protect your table. DISPOSABLE OR REUSABLE Disposable tablecloths are more convenient and hygienic than cotton ones. These table protectors are primarily used as disposable items, but also can be reused. Rinse it up with water or just roll it up and dispose of it. Turn annoying cleaning work just into piece of cake! MEET YOUR NEEDS IN VARIOUS OCCASIONS Elevate any occasion whether casual or formal with these elegant disposable table cloths. They offer the perfect table covering solution for parties, banquets, catering, cookouts, weddings, birthdays, baby showers and holiday celebrations both large and small. ABOUT US D&Z believes in what stands out in the market are the creative level we go to and our high quality products. Professional research and development team makes our products innovative and user-friendly. Safety Warning Avoid contact with extreme heat or open flames. Do not use with harsh chemicals. May not be suitable for use with certain foods or liquids. Always follow manufacturer's cleaning instructions.
